changeSet.author: liquibase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE SCHEMA LB_TEST_SCHEMA_BASIC

changeSet.author: liquibase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE SCHEMA LB_TEST_SCHEMA_COMMENT COMMENT = 'Basic test schema with comment'

changeSet.author: liquibase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TRANSIENT SCHEMA LB_TEST_SCHEMA_TRANSIENT COMMENT = 'Transient test schema'

changeSet.author: liquibase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE SCHEMA LB_TEST_SCHEMA_MANAGED WITH MANAGED ACCESS COMMENT = 'Managed access test schema'

changeSet.author: liquibase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE SCHEMA LB_TEST_SCHEMA_RETENTION DATA_RETENTION_TIME_IN_DAYS = 7 COMMENT = 'Schema with 7 day retention'

changeSet.author: liquibase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TRANSIENT SCHEMA LB_TEST_SCHEMA_FULL WITH MANAGED ACCESS DATA_RETENTION_TIME_IN_DAYS = 14 COMMENT = 'Full featured test schema'

changeSet.author: liquibase-test
changeSet.sql: ALTER SCHEMA LB_TEST_SCHEMA_BASIC SET COMMENT = 'Updated basic schema comment'

changeSet.author: liquibase-test
changeSet.sql: ALTER SCHEMA LB_TEST_SCHEMA_RETENTION SET DATA_RETENTION_TIME_IN_DAYS = 21

changeSet.author: liquibase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE LB_TEST_SCHEMA_BASIC.test_table ( id INTEGER, name VARCHAR(100), created_date TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
CREATE SEQUENCE LB_TEST_SCHEMA_BASIC.test_sequence START = 1 INCREMENT = 1

changeSet.author: liquibase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE SCHEMA LB_TEST_SCHEMA_RENAME_SOURCE COMMENT = 'Schema to be renamed'
ALTER SCHEMA LB_TEST_SCHEMA_RENAME_SOURCE RENAME TO LB_TEST_SCHEMA_RENAME_TARGET

rollback.sql: ALTER SCHEMA LB_TEST_SCHEMA_RENAME_TARGET RENAME TO LB_TEST_SCHEMA_RENAME_SOURCE

changeSet.author: liquibase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE SCHEMA LB_TEST_SCHEMA_CROSS_A
CREATE SCHEMA LB_TEST_SCHEMA_CROSS_B
CREATE TABLE LB_TEST_SCHEMA_CROSS_A.source_table ( id INTEGER, data VARCHAR(100) )
CREATE VIEW LB_TEST_SCHEMA_CROSS_B.cross_view AS SELECT * FROM LB_TEST_SCHEMA_CROSS_A.source_table

changeSet.author: liquibase-test
changeSet.sql: DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS LB_TEST_SCHEMA_BASIC CASCADE
DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS LB_TEST_SCHEMA_COMMENT
DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS LB_TEST_SCHEMA_TRANSIENT
DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS LB_TEST_SCHEMA_MANAGED
DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS LB_TEST_SCHEMA_RETENTION
DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS LB_TEST_SCHEMA_FULL
DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS LB_TEST_SCHEMA_RENAME_TARGET
DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS LB_TEST_SCHEMA_CROSS_A CASCADE
DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS LB_TEST_SCHEMA_CROSS_B CASCADE
